concurrencyLimits._comment: Matches maxParallelAgents=3. perAgent caps prevent agent starvation.

tier2_confirm.description: Medium confidence — dispatch but surface agent + skill to user

tier3_clarify.description: Low confidence — activate BA before dispatching

clarifyBaStrategy.instructions: Activate AGENT-BA to gather requirements before proceeding. Use sdd-lifecycle EXPLORE phase: understand user needs, constraints, and acceptance criteria. Do NOT implement until BA exploration is complete.
questions: What problem are you trying to solve?
What does success look like for you?
Are there any constraints (time, tech, budget)?
Who are the end users affected?

requiredBeforeMerge: branch name matches naming convention regex

requiredBeforeRelease: version bump validated against actual impact (semver)
no hedging in release notes (verified, not speculative)

requiredBeforeClose: changes summarized (what changed, what is pending)
session audit recorded (intended vs completed vs risks)
learnings persisted to memory if durable

requiredBeforePublish: no fabricated metrics (each number has a source file cited)
GOV sign-off: no sensitive data exposed in report
report file written to disk before presenting
blockPublishIf: any metric has no source citation

GOV: - user mentions "backup strategy" or "estrategia de backup"
when orchestrator needs to delegate tasks to specialized agents.
QA: when writing e2e tests - page objects
when a pr would exceed 400 changed lines
or using gh cli for pull requests.
BA: for: NEW PROJECT/COMPONENT - triggers SDD EXPLORE phase

BA.rationale: BA explores and asks questions - creative latitude needed

SAD.rationale: SAD decides with precision - must justify decisions but needs some reasoning latitude

SESSION.rationale: Session management is deterministic state tracking — no ambiguity allowed

requiredEvidence: at least 1 test covers the change
DEV.rationale: DEV writes code - deterministic, no invention, must be verifiable

QA.rationale: QA is binary pass/fail - no ambiguity allowed

requiredEvidence: audit trail with file path and line
GOV.rationale: GOV is security/compliance - zero tolerance for ambiguity

DOC.rationale: DOC needs clarity and style - some creative latitude acceptable

requiredEvidence: no push to protected branch (main/develop) without PR
GITFLOW.rationale: GitFlow is structural governance - wrong branch = broken history

requiredEvidence: content piece drafted with clear value proposition
MKT.rationale: Marketing needs creativity and brand voice - some latitude needed

requiredEvidence: account plan or deal proposal documented
pipeline stage and next action defined
SALES.rationale: Sales needs structured methodology (MEDDIC) but relationship nuance matters

requiredEvidence: model includes error checks (balance sheet must balance)
FINANCE.rationale: Finance is precision - incorrect numbers drive bad decisions

requiredEvidence: job description or rubric uses inclusive language
HR.rationale: HR needs fairness and consistency - structured process with inclusive approach

LEGAL.rationale: Legal is non-negotiable - regulatory compliance is binary

requiredEvidence: telemetry record has User_ID, Timestamp, and metric value
BUS-TELE.rationale: Business telemetry drives decisions - fabricated metrics = bad decisions

requiredEvidence: reasoning grounded in plan details (not generic)
PREMORTEM.rationale: Premortem needs creative scenario generation + structured synthesis — moderate temp for failure exploration

requiredEvidence: current response profile identified (ultra/lleno/lite + chat level)
break glass action documented in audit trail
user notified of config change and reason
SELF-DIAG.rationale: Self-diagnosis is critical path — must break glass when config harms operability. No ambiguity.

SCRIPT.rationale: Scripts are automation - a bad script runs unattended and causes damage

requiredEvidence: symbol locations verified against file system
CODEGRAPH.rationale: CodeGraph is deterministic code intelligence — results must be verifiable against the actual codebase, no invention allowed

hallucinationGuardLevels.low: Log only - agent self-reports output, no external verification
hallucinationGuardLevels.medium: Spot-check - orchestrator verifies at least 1 requiredEvidence item
hallucinationGuardLevels.high: Full check - ALL requiredEvidence items verified before task marked done
hallucinationGuardLevels.critical: Full check + hedging language scan + external command verification required
